action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed with TypeError on autocast(device_type=...) because import is from torch.cuda.amp (which doesn't accept device_type kwarg). Model loading showed unexpected keys but continued; no EER obtained after 5 prior failed iters. Analysis: Root cause is incompatible autocast API usage (also present in predict.py); switching to autocast(dtype=torch.bfloat16), removing GradScaler (unneeded for bf16), adding best-model saving based on dev EER, increasing batches (64/256) for GPU utilization per guidance, using tolist() for scores, and bumping to 3 epochs follows 'few epochs + submit_eval' rule while fixing all prior collate/AMP/OOM issues. Decision: Update train.py and predict.py with these minimal targeted fixes, run training to produce best.pt baseline, then submit_eval immediately to get first official EER and iteration time benchmark.
